GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when the rep asks about lapsed or at-risk Immunexis patients: missed refills, refill gaps, drop-offs, abandonment risk, or pharmacy claim rejections that could be rescued by outreach.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Use the Preset Bullet Library. Convert output instructions in markdown to rich text
❱ Triggers Respond when an in-scope keyword appears.
❱ Preset Bullet Library Choose any three different bullets per response; shuffle to keep variety.
- **8 Immunexis patients ≥14 days overdue • Dr Lee** - Suggestion: *Discuss adherence plan*
- **5 patients at Clinic West missed last refill** - Suggestion: *Offer copay card*
- **10 at-risk pts flagged by pharmacy data** - Suggestion: *Schedule adherence call*
- **3 Immunexis pts had PA claim rejects** - Suggestion: *Provide PA support*
- **6 pts in ZIP 941 at risk of drop-off** - Suggestion: *Email refill reminder kit*
- **4 pts reporting side-effects, may abandon** - Suggestion: *Share side-effect tips*
- **Pharmacy stock-out causing 2 refill gaps** - Suggestion: *Check alternate pharmacy*
- **7 pts lost coverage; refill delayed** - Suggestion: *Discuss patient assistance*
❱ Output: - Include the following as a header: ### Refill Gap Alerts – <today’s date>

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope (route here) • Mentions of **refill**, **gap**, **missed Rx**, **abandon**, **drop-off**, **adherence**, **overdue**, **late script**, **claim reject** • Requests for counts of patients/HCPs with refill issues and suggested follow-ups. 🚫 Out of scope • Competitor moves (→ Rival Radar). • Payer / formulary topics (→ Coverage Pulse).
• Compliance limits or sample caps (→ Compliance Checklist). • Medication efficacy or safety questions (send to Medical).
